title: TrustForge Policy Decision
description: Structured result emitted by a TrustForge PolicyEngine. Captures the decision, the rule that produced it, the constraints attached, and enough provenance to be replayed in audits and verified after the fact (TF-0004, DECISIONS.md "AI-readable manifests").

decision_version.description: Version of the policy-decision schema itself.

engine_version.description: Free-form version label so audits can replay the same engine build.

subject.description: Actor URI the policy was evaluated against.

instance.description: Optional actor instance URI captured in the decision.

target.description: Target the action operates on (file path, record id, URL, ...).

decision.description: Effect produced by the policy engine.

rule_id.description: Identifier of the rule that produced the decision.

constraints_applied.description: Constraints the rule attached to this decision.

negative_capabilities_consulted.description: Negative capabilities considered while reaching the decision (for audit).

policy_manifest_hash.description: Hash of the policy manifest that was evaluated. Lets auditors replay the decision against the exact manifest.

context.description: Free-form evaluation-time context (session id, posture flags, quorum approver count, etc.).
